dialguesToLoad.text: What the hell happened here? Did you do this, Gale?
No. When we arrived the camp was fine.
Here you are, Zack Farron. I was looking for you, but I got a little sidetracked, though.
Raghnall... What is he doing here?
You again! What do you want?
You escaped me last time, but now Mir isn't here to save you.
One thing is for sure. You are not leaving here alive!
Kay, you're still hurt. Stay back.
Got it. I'll leave to you, love.
